Created attachment 204191
py-cassandra-driver-3.17.1

Update databases/py-cassandra-driver to 3.17.1

Changelog: https://github.com/datastax/python-driver/blob/3.17.1/CHANGELOG.rst
Bug Fixes
- Socket errors EAGAIN/EWOULDBLOCK are not handled properly and cause timeouts (PYTHON-1089)

QA: Poudriere testport OK with 11.2 and 12.0
